horoscope: Venus moves into your sign today, dear Aries, where she will stay until the 30th, putting the focus on pleasure and affection. Your natural charm emerges for everyone to see! During this cycle, you tend to attract situations, things, and people into your life instead of pursuing them directly and actively, and you are incredibly well-equipped to do so. You're ready to pamper yourself, and others take a particular interest in you. Venus rules partnership and money in your solar chart, and these matters generally work in your favor in the weeks ahead. Decisions about love and money come more organically. People are especially drawn to you and intrigued with you today as Venus moves into alignment with Neptune in your sign. It's a strong time for romance, attraction, and the creative arts. You are radiating healing, mysterious, and warm energy.

Your ruling planet, Venus, heads into your solar twelfth house today, dear Taurus, and will transit this hidden area of your solar chart until the 30th. You may find more time to slip into the background to enjoy private moments and times for recuperation in the weeks ahead. New opportunities can emerge that turn your attention behind the scenes. You may reassess your affections or a relationship, or you may experience spiritual longing and attachment to the past or complicated ties. Otherwise, it's an excellent time to enjoy some solitude and privacy and become very cozy with your inner world. Ideally, you arrive at a place of greater understanding of your past and your deeper feelings about recent events during this cycle. A Venus-Neptune alignment influencing the day casts romantic or mysterious energy over today and tomorrow. Something secret or private draws you in, or you view others with more compassion. Consider that you might over-idealize a situation, particularly a financial or romantic one. You see the subtler side of things and people. There might be benefits coming your way from an unexpected source or joy felt for helping someone.

Venus begins its transit of your friendship, dreams, and ideals sector today, dear Gemini. Until the 30th, you'll enjoy more warmth, grace, or pleasure and enjoyment in your social life. Your appeal as a friend or colleague soars, and you're generally more approachable and companionable. It's a time to spread your wings, reach out, and make contact. Your tastes are for the new and different. Hooking into a dream or pursuing your happiness goals can be particularly satisfying. There is easier energy for socializing and connecting, and also for love in general, during this subtly helpful transit. You get along better with the team, or you might share some of your talents or expertise with associates with great results. Today, with Venus and Neptune heading into alignment, it's a time of illumination or illusion. You might approach a friendship issue from a new and likely more compassionate perspective. Your sympathies heighten, and it's a good time to develop new ideas for long-term happiness goals. If there is a time for mending broken fences or for forgiveness, this is it.

Venus begins its transit of your solar tenth house today, dear Cancer, and you bring more grace and charm to your work or responsibilities in the weeks ahead. Improved business connections or enhanced relationships with a parent, boss, or superior can figure strongly while Venus visits this area of your solar chart until the 30th. People more readily recognize your artistry, taste, or creativity. It's an excellent time to enjoy setting goals for yourself more thoroughly. Your reputation can see a nice boost. This is a better transit for professional appeal than it is for personal appeal. In fact, you might feel you have to work a little harder to attract the things, people, and circumstances you want outside of your work. However, you may have an easier time with your responsibilities during this cycle. There can be much enjoyment in your pursuit of long-term goals. Today, you see others in an idealistic way. You have high hopes about the direction you're taking and more faith that things will fall into place, even without a definite plan. Fuelling you right now is inspiration.

Venus moves into your sector of the higher mind today, dear Leo, and will stay there until the 30th. This transit is strong for your powers of attraction and brings desired things your way. You are a bit of a magnet right now. It also stirs your desire for more variety and diversity in your life. Shared ideas, beliefs, studies, or travels can be in focus and really move a relationship forward. Meeting special people through these activities is a possibility. You might become inspired by a loved one, or someone might awaken a new perspective or way of thinking in you. In the weeks ahead, you are less inclined to overthink your love life or your feelings and more inclined to seek out the things and people that make you happy. You are looking for more unique and interesting experiences and ideas, and you tend to see your relationships as learning experiences during this cycle. Today's energies help you let go of unhealthy attachments and encourage a dreamy, idealistic view of your life. Although there is some tendency to idealize others or romanticize situations, it's a great time for forgiveness, compassion, and new understanding.

Venus heads into your solar eighth house today for a stay until the 30th, dear Virgo. This cycle brings easygoing energy for the more intricate or complicated side of relationships in the weeks ahead. The chance to dig deep and get to the heart of a relationship, subject, or private matter can arise. It can stir up a need to share some of your deeper feelings with someone special. You might also see the deeper side of your nature in a better light. Attracting resources from outside sources comes more readily during this cycle, and it can be cleansing and rewarding to sort out problems with others. It's also a good time to discover what or who you value. Research and analysis can be satisfying and helpful, and shared resources and finances can get a nice boost during this cycle. Today's transits encourage your imagination. You can see beauty in unusual places, and your intimate world expands.

Venus begins its transit of your partnership sector today, dear Libra, moving love relationships and pleasurable matters to the foreground in your life. This transit lasts until the 30th, bringing a sense of comfort to relationships. It may not be the ideal time to tackle deep issues, but it's a solid period for pleasant interactions. Venus brings more joy and pleasure to your connections and, sometimes, a helpful person arrives in your world. You're diplomatic and accommodating, and you might often find yourself in the role of peacemaker or mediator. Your need for companionship increases in the weeks ahead. Today, you can feel inspired to do your best or pursue a dream. While you may be wearing the proverbial rose-colored glasses about a partner or a relationship, as long as you keep your feet on the ground, you can enjoy some inspiration. Somebody may be showing you special kindness, and your appeal is powerful.

Venus moves into your work and health sector today, dear Scorpio, and will visit until the 30th. Your work, working environment, or daily routines are likely in need of an overhaul regarding levels of enjoyment, peace, and harmony. Existing relationships with co-workers or people with whom you share your day, for example, can be improved, or you could meet friends through your work and daily tasks. There can be happier experiences with health workers during this cycle, or more pleasure in taking steps to improve health and nutrition. You may be in a position to support and help others, which feels good. You also feel more accomplished through cooperation and sharing. Today, as Venus heads into alignment with Neptune, fuzzy thinking can be enjoyable, encouraging you to relax and escape the mundane. You can quite successfully bring more beauty, warmth, or imagination to your daily life. Personal magnetism, especially your mystique factor, runs high.

Venus begins its transit of your romance and pleasure sector today, dear Sagittarius, and will visit there until the 30th, enhancing your natural charm. There can be good times to share, special attention to leisure and pleasure, or a more playful approach to the world. Love is yours to discover more readily as you pursue entertainment and pleasure. There can be a slight tendency to gamble if that's an inclination, or simply more confidence in sharing yourself or your creation with others. You are diversifying, expressing yourself more freely and happily. With romance, this is a favorable time for flirtations and dating. You are more approachable, easygoing, expressive, and affectionate. You're also particularly attractive to others now! Today, you can easily get caught up in fantasy. Your powers of attraction run high, and energies inspire you to express your feelings or emotions in unique ways. Your tendency to glamorize, fantasize, or romanticize people, situations, and relationships can also be powerful.

Venus begins its transit of your sector of heart and home today, dear Capricorn, where it will visit until the 30th, inspiring your domestic side. Home improvement and harmony are now a focus and attainable goals. This period is not the most connected or expressive for love and pleasure, but it's a fine time for making peace at home or with family. It's also a good time to build your confidence by centering yourself, pausing, reflecting, and feeling. Venus here can boost your relationships with family, but also with your own heart, as you become more comfortable in your own skin. You are more inclined to protect your heart and to stick to familiar things, people, and situations when it comes to affairs of the heart during this cycle. Today can be a time for dreaming up new ideas, particularly related to home life, harmony, comfort, and understanding. An escape from recent pressures seems appropriate now.

Venus begins its transit of your communications sector today, dear Aquarius, boosting your enjoyment of learning and sharing until the 30th. There could be some good publicity or news, invitations, and increased ease in your social life in the weeks ahead. The need for verbal rapport in your relationships is in the spotlight, and you're placing more value than usual on exchanging ideas. You communicate more cheerfully and tactfully during this cycle. You also gravitate to things that improve or engage your mind. This Venus cycle offers a subtle boost to your ability to express yourself warmly, kindly, and appealingly. With Mercury retrograde until the 20th, this Venus transit is especially helpful for smoothing over misunderstandings. It can also help you attract desirable projects and experiences your way. Today's transits help you see the beauty in your daily environment and your connections. News coming in, or a conversation you have, can be inspiring, forgiving, or relieving.

Venus begins its transit of your resources sector today, dear Pisces. Until the 30th, you can find more joy in building upon your current resources and padding your life in ways that help you feel more stable and comfortable. It's a good cycle for making money, although not always perfect for money management. However, you are exceptionally skilled at making the best of your resources. In the weeks ahead, you crave some stability and predictability in your relationships and emotional life. Gifts or pay increases are possible. The ability to relate well with others might enhance your own personal finances. When it comes to matters of the heart, you value those who make you feel comfortable, and familiarity is more important to you than the excitement of new love during this cycle. Today's transits boost your powers of attraction. Your dreams, fantasies, or ideals are in sharper focus than usual. You crave understanding and appreciation, and you are particularly generous with others and perhaps yourself.
